**Overall verdict: ‚öÝÔ∏è 7 WARN (English leakage in some locales)**

### Summary (8 locales √ó 5 pages)

| Locale | Verdict | Leakage pages |

| en | PASS | 0 |
| ru | WARN | 4 |
| de | WARN | 4 |
| es | WARN | 4 |

| it | WARN | 4 |

### English Leakage (non-en locales)

Screenshots organized by locale in `qa-zai145-screenshots/`.

## ZAI-145 Cross-Locale Sweep Report ‚Äî FAIL

**Sweep date:** 2026-05-07
**Locales checked:** de, el, en, es, pt, ru, uk, zh (8 total)
**Locale note:** fr and it listed in task spec do not exist in codebase; el and uk are present instead and were checked.

---

## Overall Verdict: FAIL

Three root-cause bugs found affecting all 7 non-English locales. Issue properties ([ZAI-141](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-141)) and ru/de locale JSON coverage are the only clean areas.

---

## Bug 1 ‚Äî activity-format.ts: ALL verb strings hardcoded English ([ZAI-143](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-143) incomplete)

**File:** `ui/src/lib/activity-format.ts` (lines 24‚Äì111)

`ACTIVITY_ROW_VERBS` and `ISSUE_ACTIVITY_LABELS` are plain TypeScript records with hardcoded English. `formatActivityVerb()` and `formatIssueActivityAction()` accept no `t` function and never call i18n. The locale JSON keys (`activity.verbs.*`, `activity.issue_labels.*`, `activity.changes.*`) exist and are key-complete in all 8 locales ‚Äî but are **never called by any component**.

**Affected surfaces:**
- Activity page ‚Äî `ActivityRow.tsx:31` calls `formatActivityVerb()` with no locale
- Issue detail activity feed ‚Äî `IssueDetail.tsx:1132` calls `formatIssueActivityAction()` with no locale

**Example (Russian):** Expected: ¬´—Å–æ–∑–¥–∞–ª –∑–∞–¥–∞—á—É¬ª ¬∑ Actual: ¬´created the issue¬ª

Actor label `"Board"` also hardcoded (line 146) ‚Äî should use `activity.actor.board`.

---

## Bug 2 ‚Äî relativeTime() in utils.ts: no locale support ([ZAI-144](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-144) incomplete)

**File:** `ui/src/lib/utils.ts:57‚Äì69`

Returns hardcoded English: `"just now"`, `"2m ago"`, `"3d ago"`. No `locale` parameter. ZAI-144 explicitly named `utils.ts` in scope.

`timeAgo()` in `timeAgo.ts` supports locale when called correctly, but R3-surface callers omit the locale:
- `Dashboard.tsx:380` ‚Äî `timeAgo(issue.updatedAt)` ‚Äî no locale
- `ActivityRow.tsx:67` ‚Äî `timeAgo(event.createdAt)` ‚Äî no locale
- `ActiveAgentsPanel.tsx:170` ‚Äî `relativeTime()` directly ‚Üí English
- `IssueDetail.tsx:1133` ‚Äî `relativeTime()` directly ‚Üí English

Correct pattern (already used in `Inbox.tsx:479`): `timeAgo(approval.updatedAt, i18n.language)`

---

## Bug 3 ‚Äî Locale JSON key gaps in el, es, pt, uk, zh

**dashboard.json** ‚Äî `live.*` section missing in el, es, pt, uk, zh (8 keys): `live.active_recent`, `live.breadcrumb`, `live.empty_create_company`, `live.empty_select_company`, `live.panel_empty`, `live.showing_up_to`, `live.subtitle`, `live.title`

**inbox.json** ‚Äî 61 keys missing in el, es, pt, uk, zh. Entire sections absent: `actions.*`, `creators.*`, `dialog.*`, `errors.*`, `filters.*` (partial), `misc.*` (partial), `join_queue.*`. Only ru and de are complete.

---

## Per-locale verdict

| Locale | Dashboard | Issue Props | Inbox | Activity | Rel. Times | VERDICT |
|--------|-----------|-------------|-------|----------|------------|---------|
| en | PASS | PASS | PASS | PASS | PASS | **PASS** |
| ru | PASS | PASS | PASS | FAIL (B1) | FAIL (B2) | **FAIL** |
| de | PASS | PASS | PASS | FAIL (B1) | FAIL (B2) | **FAIL** |
| el | FAIL (B3) | PASS | FAIL (B3) | FAIL (B1) | FAIL (B2) | **FAIL** |
| es | FAIL (B3) | PASS | FAIL (B3) | FAIL (B1) | FAIL (B2) | **FAIL** |
| pt | FAIL (B3) | PASS | FAIL (B3) | FAIL (B1) | FAIL (B2) | **FAIL** |
| uk | FAIL (B3) | PASS | FAIL (B3) | FAIL (B1) | FAIL (B2) | **FAIL** |
| zh | FAIL (B3) | PASS | FAIL (B3) | FAIL (B1) | FAIL (B2) | **FAIL** |

---

## What passed

- `ru/dashboard.json`: 37 keys present (includes live.* section) ‚úÖ
- `ru/inbox.json`: 104 keys complete ‚úÖ
- `activity.json`: all 8 locales key-complete ‚úÖ
- `common.priorities.*` translated in all locales ‚úÖ
- `issues.detail.properties` = ¬´–°–≤–æ–π—Å—Ç–≤–∞¬ª (ru) ‚úÖ
- `ActiveAgentsPanel` title default removed, falls through to `t("title")` ‚úÖ
- `Inbox.tsx` approval timestamps use `i18n.language` ‚úÖ

---

## Required fixes before ZAI-145 can pass

1. **`activity-format.ts`** ‚Äî accept `t` function in verb formatters, route through locale keys
2. **`utils.ts`** ‚Äî add `locale?` param to `relativeTime()` using `Intl.RelativeTimeFormat`
3. **Caller sites** ‚Äî pass `i18n.language` in Dashboard.tsx, ActivityRow.tsx, ActiveAgentsPanel.tsx, IssueDetail.tsx
4. **`dashboard.json`** el/es/pt/uk/zh ‚Äî add 8 `live.*` keys
5. **`inbox.json`** el/es/pt/uk/zh ‚Äî add 61 missing keys

Filed findings on [ZAI-139](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-139) per deliverable requirement. ZAI-145 stays in_progress.

## ZAI-145 triaged ÔøΩ waiting on 5 blockers

All 5 implementation issues are currently `in_progress`:
- ZAI-140 (Dashboard strings) ÔøΩ in_progress
- ZAI-141 (Issue properties strings) ÔøΩ in_progress
- ZAI-142 (Inbox filter strings) ÔøΩ in_progress
- ZAI-143 (Activity feed templates) ÔøΩ in_progress
- ZAI-144 (Date/time formatters) ÔøΩ in_progress

I will begin the cross-locale screenshot sweep (8 locales ÔøΩ 8 pages = 64 screenshots) as soon as all 5 are `done`. Polling for unblock.
